Carousel
🧬

01The Composition Engine

Nexus doesn't pick slides randomly. It composes — selecting each slide type based on the emotional position in the narrative arc, the content density of the brief, and the target audience's cognitive load budget.

SLIDEFORGE DEEP DIVE
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
CORE DEFINITION

Slide Composition

/slaɪd kəm-pə-zi-shən/

The algorithmic selection and sequencing of slide types to create an emotionally coherent narrative. Unlike templating, composition adapts to the content, not the other way around.

Composition is what separates Nexus from every 'AI slide generator' that just fills in a template.

SLIDEFORGE DEEP DIVE
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Every visual element is computed, not hardcoded.

Dynamic font scaling — Text sizes adjust based on content density — dense slides get smaller type, sparse slides breathe
Theme token system — Material Design 3 tonal palette with per-preset color overrides
SLIDEFORGE DEEP DIVE
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

How Composition Works

01
Brief Analysis
NLP extracts topic, tone, audience, and intent from natural language
02
Arc Selection
Matches intent to one of 7 emotional arc categories across 28 presets
03
Slide Sequencing
Selects slide types that advance the arc, enforcing DLD rhythm and variety constraints
04
Visual Rendering
Each slide compiles with dynamic typography, theme tokens, and content-adaptive layout

Automated 3-step compilation pipeline converting raw JSON specifications into production-ready carousel assets.

SLIDEFORGE DEEP DIVE
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Template vs Composition

BEFORE

Template Output: Fixed 5-slide structure. Same grid on every slide. Text crammed into boxes designed for shorter content.

→
AFTER

Composed Output: 8-15 slides adapted to content density. Each slide type chosen for its communication function. Typography scales to fit.

Engagement Improvement
3.1x
SLIDEFORGE DEEP DIVE
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
